question: How many tons of fish died in the Piracicaba River incident in July 2024?
ground_truth: Between 10 and 20 tons of fish died in the incident.
event_desc: 17 July  A massive fishkill suspected to have been caused by the dumping of industrial waste from a sugar and ethanol plant results in the deaths of between 10 and 20 tons of fish in the Piracicaba River in São Paulo state.
